hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Cross-sectional daily top-k ranking (long top 3-4 by LGBM pred at 14:00 ET, exit next day) beats per-ticker threshold entries
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase topk (4 variants: k∈{3,4} × snapshot∈{13:00,14:00 ET}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — held pending Railway backtest; freeze intact
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Highest architectural change; backtest required before merge. Lower run priority than H5/H2 which are already deployed and need validation first.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: SPY/QQQ regime overlay (only deploy full heat when SPY > 20d MA) improves Sharpe by cutting down-tape exposure
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase spy_ma (4 variants: spy_ma10_gate, spy_ma10_half, spy_ma20_gate, spy_ma20_half vs baseline; acceptance = improvement on BOTH legs)
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — backtest phase now available in PR feat/rnd-H2H6-spy-ma-backtest-persistence
implementation_summary: Added _fetch_spy_ma20() to src/data/market_regime.py — fetches SPY daily bars via yfinance, computes 20-day SMA, returns spy_above_20d_ma bool and market_regime_scalar (1.0 above MA, 0.5 below).
Extended MarketRegimeSnapshot with spy_price, spy_ma20, spy_above_20d_ma, market_regime_scalar. Defaults to spy_above_20d_ma=True (fail-open) on any error.
_poll_once() now runs VIX and SPY MA fetches in parallel via asyncio.gather.
signal_loop._act_on_signal(): applies market_regime_scalar to new-entry notional after choppy-regime scale and before Kelly probation floor.
Added 19 new unit tests in tests/unit/test_market_regime.py — all green.
2026-07-17: Added --phase spy_ma to research_backtest.py: _load_spy_ma_map() + 4 variant phase_spy_ma(). simulate() extended with spy_ma_map parameter.
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — no lookahead (daily closes from prior sessions only), fail-open, no risk control modification. N unknown until Railway backtest.
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Reduced long-side exposure during down-tape markets. Sharpe improvement mechanism: fewer losing entries against market headwinds. Quantification requires Railway backtest over May-Jun 2026 window.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Conservative risk reduction; clean mechanism. Second backtest priority after H5 (already deployed and owner priority). Backtest phase now available — ready for Railway worker.
hypothesis_queue.tpm_flag: needs_data_run since 2026-07-11 — 6 days ⚠️ PAST FLAG THRESHOLD

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Earnings-calendar blackout (no entries within 2 days of earnings) removes uncompensated gap risk on 1-day holds
hypothesis_queue.test: backtest excluding earnings windows vs baseline: report Sharpe/PF/win-rate/drawdown/n per leg, plus lost-opportunity cost (trades skipped)
implementation_summary: Added EARNINGS_BLACKOUT_DAYS=2 constant.
Added _compute_earnings_blackout(tickers) — fetches yf.Ticker.calendar per ticker in a thread, fail-open (None = no block).
Added _maybe_refresh_earnings_dates() — refreshes cache once per trading day (390 ticks) via _tick_maintenance.
Added _in_earnings_blackout(ticker) — symmetric ±2-day window in ET, fail-open on unknown date.
Added Gate 0c in _sizing_entry_gate_open: blocks new entries in blackout; existing positions exit normally.
Added 9 new unit tests in test_signal_loop.py — all green.
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — no lookahead (earnings date is known before announcement), fail-open, no risk control modification. N unknown until Railway backtest. Must report lost-opportunity cost alongside Sharpe delta.
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Removes uncompensated gap risk on 1-day holds around earnings. Universe restriction mechanism: fewer entries near announcements. Net Sharpe impact uncertain — depends on whether those trades were net positive (lost alpha) or negative (removed noise).
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Risk reduction hypothesis; outcome uncertain (may remove alpha). Validate H5 and H2 first, then run opportunity-cost analysis.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Removing dead ensemble weights (Transformer/TCN contribute 0.0 in every live trade) and renormalizing LGBM 60->75, sentiment 20->25 sharpens the entry signal
hypothesis_queue.test: IC comparison of reweighted ensemble on validation window
implementation_summary: Added EnsembleWeights.renormalize_dropping_dead_models(active) classmethod.
Fixed EnsembleWeights.from_staging() key mismatch bug.
Fixed ProfitAgent._propose_weights() missing lgbm key and dead-weight auto-detection.
Fixed ProfitAgent.run() to write 'ensemble_weights' key in staging file.
Added 18 new unit tests in tests/unit/test_ensemble_weights.py.
63/63 unit tests green (test_signal_loop.py excluded: torch not installed in sandbox).
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — calibration correction only. Needs data run for IC delta confirmation.
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Ensemble signal correctly calibrated to [-1, +1] range. RL obs dim-0 more informative.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Calibration fix already in production; IC delta confirmation is useful but not blocking. Lowest Railway backtest priority.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal-reconfirmed hold extension: at max_hold (390 bars), if the ticker would qualify as a FRESH entry right now (lgbm_pred_return > dynamic cost threshold AND dir_prob >= 0.60), extend the hold one more day instead of exiting — equivalent to a re-entry without paying the round-trip spread. Hard caps: max 2 extensions (3 days absolute), stops/trail/target always active, extension NEVER allowed if position is at a loss > 1x daily vol.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase holdext (4 variants: max_ext∈{1,2} × loss_gate_mult∈{1.0,2.0}; acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs)
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: BOTH DRAFT — awaiting Railway backtest; --phase holdext available in PR #9
implementation_summary: Added MAX_HOLD_EXTENSIONS=2 constant (3-day absolute cap).

Added _maybe_extend_hold(ticker, sig, unrealized) — grants extension if: extensions_used < 2, unrealized >= -1x daily_vol, signal re-qualifies (|pred_ret| > threshold AND dir_prob >= 0.60). Resets bars_held=0 when granted.
Modified _check_sizing_exit max_hold branch to call _maybe_extend_hold before returning 'max_hold'.
_clear_sizing_state now also clears _hold_extension_count to prevent stale state.
Added 8 new unit tests in test_signal_loop.py — all green.
Confirmed existing PDT defer test and next-day exit test still pass with H5 changes.
2026-07-16: Added --phase holdext to research_backtest.py (PR #9).
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — signal-conditional, not unconditional (the unconditional version was tested and showed -493bps). Fail-safe: MAX_HOLD_EXTENSIONS hard cap, daily_vol loss gate, and all original stops remain active. N unknown until Railway backtest.
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Let winners run past 1-day time limit when the signal re-confirms conviction. Mechanism: replaces forced max_hold exit with a re-qualified 1-day hold window. Evidence for: max_hold cohort 5W/4L (best exit type). Risk: adds beta exposure if model confidence is illusory — the daily_vol loss gate mitigates but doesn't eliminate this.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Highest Railway backtest priority: owner-requested, strongest live evidence base (5W/4L max_hold cohort), most likely material Sharpe improvement.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal persistence filter: require min N consecutive qualifying bars (pred_return > threshold AND dir_prob >= dead_hi) before entering a new position — prevents chasing transient signal spikes that quickly reverse
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase persistence (variants: min_persistence_bars ∈ {0, 1, 2, 3}; n=0 is exact baseline by construction; acceptance = Sharpe improvement on BOTH tune AND validation legs; n_trades reduction must be offset by win_rate improvement)
implementation_summary: Added min_persistence_bars: int = 0 field to Params dataclass (0 = disabled, backward-compatible).
Added signal_streak: dict[str, int] = {} to simulate() state.
Signal streak is updated every bar (inside and outside entry window) for all tickers.
Streak incremented when pred_return > threshold AND dir_prob > dead_hi; reset to 0 otherwise.
Entry candidates additionally filtered by signal_streak[ticker] >= min_persistence_bars.
Added phase_persistence() function testing 4 variants on both walk-forward legs.
Added 11 new unit tests in tests/unit/test_research_backtest_spy_persistence.py — all green.
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — no lookahead (streak only uses historical bars up to current), no risk control modification. min_persistence_bars=0 is strictly identical to baseline (verified by test). N unknown until Railway backtest. Negative result likely if n_trades drops >50% with no Sharpe improvement (lost alpha).
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Hypothesis: persistent signal (N consecutive bars) indicates genuine directional conviction vs single-bar noise spikes. Expected: ~20-40% fewer entries for persistence=2, higher win_rate, Sharpe improvement uncertain. Risk: delayed entry = worse fill price on fast-moving entries; may miss slow-moving signals that reverse before N bars accumulate.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: New entry-quality hypothesis. Lower priority than H5/H2 (already deployed and being measured). Run after H5 and H2 backtest data arrives. If Railway worker is enabled, cost is low to run alongside existing phases.
